{# creative-colorful.html — Vibrant purple-amber style for marketing and creative decks #} {% extends "base_reveal.html" %} {% set style = { "reveal_theme": "moon", "font_heading": "'Poppins', 'Nunito', sans-serif", "font_body": "'Open Sans', 'Nunito', sans-serif", "heading_color": "#8b5cf6", "text_color": "#1e1b4b", "accent_color": "#f59e0b", "link_hover": "#d97706", "table_header_bg": "#8b5cf6", "table_stripe_bg": "rgba(139,92,246,0.06)", "blockquote_bg": "rgba(245,158,11,0.08)", "code_bg": "#fef3c7" } %} {% set transition = "zoom" %} {% block extra_css %} body { background: #fffbeb; } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #f59e0b); } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h1, .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h3 { color: #ffffff; } .reveal h2 { border-left: 5px solid {{ style.accent_color }}; padding-left: 0.5em; } .reveal ul li::marker { color: {{ style.accent_color }}; } .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #8b5cf6); } .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] h2, .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] p { color: #ffffff; } {% endblock %}
